ribbon.text: AgriFoodTech initiative · technology for Latin America's agrifood value chain
footer.tagline: AgriFoodTech technology for agriculture across Latin America.
footer.legal: © 2026 Quantix Analitic S.A.S. · Bogotá D.C., Colombia
home.title: Quantix Analitic · AgriFoodTech Technology
home.hero.title_a: Technology that brings intelligence to your
home.hero.sub: Quantix Analitic builds AgriFoodTech software for agriculture. Meet viewQ, our platform uniting operations, finance and artificial intelligence in one place.
home.vq.title: Operations, intelligence and AI in one place
home.vq.li1: production, inventory, purchasing, sales, costs, accounting.
home.vq.li2: KPIs, alerts, harvest forecasting and corporate consolidation.
home.vq.li3: talk to your entire operation by voice or text, in seconds.
home.prod.title: One software house, four platforms
home.prod.sub: We build technology that solves real problems across operations, finance, legal and healthcare.
home.prod.vq.desc: Agricultural intelligence platform: operations, finance, analytics and AI for companies and multi-farm, multi-crop groups (avocado, citrus, oil palm and more).
home.prod.flow.desc: Receivables and collections for businesses: visibility and control over accounts-receivable recovery.
home.prod.jur.desc: AI-powered legal platform for law firms: legal research and analysis.
home.prod.cli.desc: Medical records, scheduling and occupational health for clinics, providers and companies.
home.aft.title: Technology for the entire agrifood value chain
home.aft.lead: Our solutions improve the productivity, competitiveness and operational efficiency of agrifood businesses — accelerating technology adoption and innovation across the sector.
home.aft.p1.d: Greater efficiency at every link of the chain.
home.aft.p2.d: From spreadsheets and paper to an AI-powered platform.
home.aft.eco: Part of the AgriFoodTech ecosystem in Colombia and Latin America.
home.about.title: Who we are
home.about.p1: Quantix Analitic is a Colombian software house specialized in technology for the agrifood sector. We design, build and support every platform closely — evolving the product alongside our clients' real-world operations.
home.about.p2: That closeness — talking directly with the people who build the platform — is what sets us apart.
viewq.title: viewQ · Quantix Analitic
viewq.head.title: viewQ — Agricultural Intelligence Platform
viewq.head.lead: The agricultural operating system that unites field operations, finance and an AI copilot. One platform to run and scale your operation — across crops like avocado, citrus, oil palm and more.
viewq.band.title: Operations, intelligence and AI in one place
viewq.band.li1: production, inventory, purchasing, sales, costs, accounting.
viewq.band.li2: KPIs, alerts, harvest forecasting and corporate consolidation.
viewq.band.li3: talk to your entire operation by voice or text, in seconds.
viewq.f2.d: Geospatial maps, kriging and interpolation, forecasting with predictive models.
viewq.f3.d: Costs, profitability, receivables and e-invoicing integration.
viewq.f4.d: Corporate consolidation: every farm comparable as a single organization.
viewq.f5.d: Field app with offline capture and QR scanning at harvest.
viewq.f6.d: A copilot that answers about production, profitability, receivables and more.
viewq.cta.title: Explore viewQ in depth
viewq.cta.sub: See the full platform, with Qpasa in action.
serv.title: Services · Quantix Analitic
serv.head.title: Data analytics, AI and platform development
serv.head.lead: Beyond our products, we support companies with tailored solutions: from data to decision, with modern, scalable technology.
serv.model.label: Engagement:
serv.s1.d: Our flagship solution: integrate, analyze and visualize operational, financial and technical data in real time.
serv.s2.d: Design and build of solutions to centralize and leverage enterprise information.
serv.s4.d: Analytical models to optimize decisions and anticipate scenarios.
serv.s5.d: Streamlining the generation and distribution of key information.
serv.s6.d: Guidance for companies aiming to become data-driven.
serv.li.agro: Agronomy modules: nutrition, pests, production, geolocation
serv.li.sources: Integration of multiple sources (ERP, Excel, APIs, IoT)
serv.li.publish: Secure publishing to Power BI Service
serv.cta.title: Have a data challenge?
serv.cta.sub: Tell us your case and we'll map the path.
flow.title: Quantix Flow · Quantix Analitic
flow.head.title: Quantix Flow — B2B receivables & collections
flow.head.lead: A platform that brings visibility and control to business-to-business receivables: prioritize, track and accelerate your cash flow.
flow.c1.d: Real-time status of receivables and balances by customer.
flow.c2.d: Prioritization and support throughout the collection process.
flow.c3.d: Better collection predictability to decide ahead of time.
flow.cta.title: Interested in Quantix Flow?
jur.title: QJurídico · Quantix Analitic
jur.head.title: QJurídico — AI-powered legal platform
jur.head.lead: Artificial intelligence for law firms: research, analyze and leverage legal information faster and more accurately.
jur.c1.d: AI-assisted search and analysis of legal information.
jur.c2.d: Organize and leverage the firm's knowledge.
jur.cta.title: Would your firm like to see QJurídico?
cli.title: Qlinic · Quantix Analitic
cli.head.title: Qlinic — Medical records & occupational health
cli.head.lead: A platform for clinics, providers and occupational-health companies: medical records, scheduling, occupational-exam workflows and company reporting — all in one place, secure and traceable.
cli.c1.d: Centralized clinical and occupational records, with patient tracking and follow-up.
cli.c2.d: Physician scheduling, appointment-compliance tracking and reminders.
cli.c3.d: End-to-end flow: order → exam → results → fitness opinion → certificate.
cli.c4.d: Intake of clinical exams and medical information from labs and external systems.
cli.c5.d: Occupational-health reports and downloadable fitness certificates by company.
cli.c6.d: Patient intake for occupational exams at company sites, also from mobile.
cli.compliance.d: Built around Colombian medical-records regulations and health-data protection (Habeas Data), with role-based access control and auditing.
cli.cta.title: Would your clinic or company like to see Qlinic?
about.title: About · Quantix Analitic
about.head.title: We drive smart decisions with data and AI
about.head.lead: Quantix Analitic is a Colombian software house specialized in technology for the agrifood and business sectors. We design, build and support every platform closely.
about.mission.d: We help companies make strategic decisions through data analytics and artificial intelligence, building solutions that optimize efficiency and accelerate growth.
about.vision.d: To be a leading data-analytics and AI company, recognized for transforming how organizations make decisions and run their operations.
about.values.title: Our values
about.values.v1.d: Modern technology solutions built on data and AI.
about.values.v2.d: We turn information into clear, reliable, actionable decisions.
about.values.v3.d: We work to create real impact on our clients' business.
about.why.title: Why Quantix?
about.founder.desc: He built viewQ end to end, with direct experience in export floriculture and Colombian agriculture. Talking directly with the person who designs the platform is our biggest advantage.
